title: 9 Teas for Soldiers with Foot Odor
description: Cymbopogon citratus teas, also known as lemongrass tea, can be a helpful remedy for foot odor. This is because lemongrass contains compounds like citral, geraniol, and limonene, which have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. These properties help to reduce the growth of bacteria and fungi that cause foot odor. When you consume lemongrass tea, the compounds are absorbed into your bloodstream and can reach your feet through your circulatory system, helping to combat odor-causing bac...
